name: Amsterdam
profile: The Netherlands' capital and largest economy — finance, tech and startups, creative industries, tourism, and the European base for many international companies.

name: Rotterdam
profile: Home to Europe's largest seaport — logistics, maritime and energy, engineering, trade, and a fast-growing architecture and design scene.

name: The Hague
profile: The seat of Dutch government and international law — public administration, NGOs, legal and diplomatic institutions, and cyber-security.

name: Eindhoven
profile: The Brainport high-tech hub — semiconductors, electronics, advanced manufacturing, and one of Europe's densest concentrations of R&D and engineering.

name: Utrecht
profile: A central knowledge and services city — healthcare and life sciences, education, IT, and sustainability, anchored by a major university and research hospitals.
